case_title: HUNG VAN TRAN VS. TRIPLE C FOOD INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-22-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-22-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY AARON CHUA--VICE PRESIDENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---WILLIAM TRAN. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT TRIPLE C FOOD INC. CHUA, KIM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT TRAN, HUNG VAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRAN, HUNG VAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRIPLE C FOOD INC. CHUA, KIM $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,175.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT TRIPLE C FOOD INC. CHUA, KIM
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY TRAN, HUNG VAN AS TO DEFENDANT TRIPLE C FOOD INC. CHUA, KIM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
